FARTDAMENTAL PAPER EDUCATION! THE FART FETISH-BASED AU FOR ALL THINGS FUNDAMENTAL PAPER EDUCATION! Everyone is drastically thicker, and far gassier to boot!

Most of the art used is by Momiji, but there's other artists, who I'll all list below.

And so many more characters! All ripping ass for YOUR pleasure! Or pain, depending on how you view this.

This is the culmination of all my efforts, to condense all the Teacher bots into one, as well as add all the students. Or at least, the significant ones. Seriously though, I promised I would do this for 1000 followers, and words cannot express how happy I am that I can get this done on. WOO! YALL ROCK!

Of course, due to the absolutely massive token count this bot will have, a proxy like DeepSeek or something similar will be outright needed for this bot to not shit itself. A lorebook would probably help combat this, but I don't know how to make one exactly, so pbbbbbt. I will eventually make a lorebook version to cut down massively on token space,and if it acts weird here, I will pour my blood, sweat and cum to fix this.

Keep it cool, and once again. Thank you all for 1,000 ffollowers.
